  "findings": [
    "Over-greasing has occurred, resulting in a purged seal prior to the start of operation."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Clean excess grease from the housing and seal area.",
    "Inspect the seal for permanent displacement or damage.",
    "Replace the seal if it has been deformed or blown out by excessive pressure.",
    "Relieve internal pressure and verify correct grease volume according to SKF/Timken specifications before commissioning."
  ],
  "rationale": "Over-greasing causes excessive heat generation, premature seal failure, and potential bearing damage due to churning. A purged seal indicates that excessive pressure has already compromised the sealing lip, which must be corrected before the equipment is put into service.",
  "references": [
    "SKF Bearing Installation and Maintenance Guide",
    "Timken Engineering Manual - Lubrication Section"
  ]
}
